message:
test(fr-conformance): filter CLIENT REPLY OFF/SKIP + CLIENT LIST from live oracle (br-frankenredis-bcww)

CLIENT REPLY OFF and CLIENT REPLY SKIP tell upstream to stop
acknowledging commands, wedging the per-case TCP read in a
single-connection harness. CLIENT LIST structurally differs between
a multi-connection upstream (redis-server sees our harness client
plus whatever else the test framework is running) and fr-runtime's
single harness client.

Filtering both closes the bcww wedge. core_client now runs to
completion: 113/125 pass; the remaining 12 divergences (CLIENT
INFO/ID drift, HELLO id drift, CLIENT NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH/CACHING/
SETINFO wording, CLIENT PAUSE negative-timeout) are tracked as
br-frankenredis-w579.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
